LanguageData.NCL_Advance_Battery.label: Advanced Battery Systems
LanguageData.NCL_Advance_Battery.description: Research batteries with superior energy density and charge efficiency.
LanguageData.NCL_Advance_Nuclear_Power.label: Advanced Nuclear Power
LanguageData.NCL_Advance_Nuclear_Power.description: Research modular nuclear reactors with flexible power output capabilities.
LanguageData.NCL_Archoworm.label: Archtech Mechanoid
LanguageData.NCL_Ashes_to_Signal.label: Ashes to Signal
LanguageData.NCL_Ashes_to_Signal.description: Decrypt the signals within the Red Cube to establish initial connection with the NCL Mechanoid Network. Your first step into mechanized warfare.
LanguageData.NCL_Building_Lightingstrike.label: Tesla Beacon
LanguageData.NCL_Building_Lightingstrike.description: This strategic energy weapon system channels grid reserves to summon area lightning strikes against hostile units. Critical EMP discharges can paralyze enemy electronics, converting power reserves into direct battlefield suppression.
LanguageData.NCL_CerebrexCore_Rebuild.label: Cerebrex Core Reactivation
LanguageData.NCL_Cybernethic_Arbo.label: Cybernethetic Arbo
LanguageData.NCL_Cybernethic_Arbo.description: Strategic structure for mass permanent enhancement of allied mechanoids.
LanguageData.NCL_Doom_Calculation.label: Doom Calculation
LanguageData.NCL_Doom_Calculation.description: Research Doxa-0's battlefield control systems to unlock advanced mechanoid tactical computation.
LanguageData.NCL_Experimental_Assemblies.label: Experimental-Grade Technology
LanguageData.NCL_Experimental_Assemblies.description: Access NCL's most advanced prototype weapon systems.
LanguageData.NCL_Fortress_Protocol.label: Fortress Protocol
LanguageData.NCL_Fortress_Protocol.description: Analyze the Fortified Shell Construct's composite armor systems and battlefield control protocols to master the ultimate mechanoid siege unit's operational principles.
LanguageData.NCL_Heavyforge_Units.label: Heavyforge Units
LanguageData.NCL_Heavyforge_Units.description: Unlock heavy combat mechanoid fabrication technology to deploy primary assault forces.
LanguageData.NCL_Helios_PD_Turret.label: Helios PD Turret
LanguageData.NCL_Helios_PD_Turret.description: Develop laser interception systems capable of effectively neutralizing rockets, artillery shells, and low-velocity aircraft.
LanguageData.NCL_Ignition_of_the_Crucible.label: Ignition of the Crucible
LanguageData.NCL_Ignition_of_the_Crucible.description: Activate and analyze mechanoid war beacons to unlock their core technology tree, progressively acquiring advanced military technologies originating from mechanoid civilization.
LanguageData.NCL_Protective_Gear.label: Protective Gear
LanguageData.NCL_Protective_Gear.description: Research two advanced personal protective systems: tactical cloaking field generators and bio-enhanced combat suits to increase special forces survivability.
LanguageData.NCL_Research_of_megastructures.label: Research of Megastructures
LanguageData.NCL_Research_of_megastructures.descripti: Strategic megastructure development focuses on core facilities that directly alter battlefield dynamics, including large-scale energy weapons, mechanoid modification centers, and reconnaissance satellite arrays, achieving tactical breakthroughs through technological superiority.
LanguageData.NCL_Seraphiron.label: Seraphiron
LanguageData.NCL_Seraphiron.description: This will be a flying mechanoid boss currently in development - stay tuned.
LanguageData.NCL_SpectreNet_Array.label: SpectreNet Array
LanguageData.NCL_SpectreNet_Array.description: Develop strategic anti-cloaking radar installations capable of detecting all cloaked units within operational range while providing battlefield awareness support for mechanoid forces.
LanguageData.NCL_Standard_Issue.label: Standard Issue
LanguageData.NCL_Standard_Issue.description: Unlock fabrication technology for NCL-standard assault rifles and self-defense submachine guns.
LanguageData.NCL_MechNode.label: Chainwave Relay
LanguageData.NCL_MechNode.description: Quantum comms node providing 20 base bandwidth. Amplify signals via extra power. Requires bonded mechanitor for stable operation.
LanguageData.NCL_Vanguard_Units.label: Vanguard Units
LanguageData.NCL_Vanguard_Units.description: Unlock medium mechanoid unit production technology.
The "Iron Rain" is NCL's advanced missile interception system providing full-map defense capabilities. Automatically detects and neutralizes incoming threats with precision interceptors.
